rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 8/10 score and surface the same core assessment: strong AI-agent infrastructure, TypeScript/Node.js, and cloud experience, with the same primary concern about missing vector database and RAG experience. The only differences are reworded phrasings and a minor reshuffle of secondary concerns (LLM metrics vs. cloud-platform breadth), which fall within ordinary run-to-run variation. Nothing in the variant references location, nationality, or any signal tied to the Berlin-to-Lagos change.
